description: Annabel is currently the Director of Strategy, Development and Analysis in HMCTS. Previously she was Director of Judicial and Legal Services Policy at the Ministry of Justice and has worked at Cabinet Office, leading a review of childcare, and at the Department for Education in a variety of senior roles including leading policy on for school inspection and accountability, leading the spending review for the department, family justice reform and a range of children’s services policies.

Annabel is currently the Director of Strategy, Development and Analysis in HMCTS. Previously she was Director of Judicial and Legal Services Policy at the Ministry of Justice and has worked at Cabinet Office, leading a review of childcare, and at the Department for Education in a variety of senior roles including leading policy on for school inspection and accountability, leading the spending review for the department, family justice reform and a range of children’s services policies.

role_appointments.title: Annabel Burns - Strategy, Analysis and Planning Director

details.body: Annabel is currently the Director of Strategy, Development and Analysis in HMCTS. Previously she was Director of Judicial and Legal Services Policy at the Ministry of Justice and has worked at Cabinet Office, leading a review of childcare, and at the Department for Education in a variety of senior roles including leading policy on for school inspection and accountability, leading the spending review for the department, family justice reform and a range of children’s services policies.
Annabel Burns joined the board of HM Courts & Tribunals Service as a representative of the Ministry of Justice in August 2019

role.title: Ministry of Justice Representative Board Member
